text: The open, quietly-lit room in the first scene draws me into contemplation, its emptiness urging reflection on the spaces we inhabit and the meaning we attribute to them. Moving to the vibrant wall of ideas in the second scene, I sense a spark of intellectual curiosity. The R+D display feels energetic and filled with possibility—a celebration of inquiry and progress. Here, I am both present and searching, grounded yet hungry to connect ideas. It’s the tension between silence and stimulation that stirs my philosophical mind, reminding me how environments shape the questions I ask of the world.
